_comment: Sample for ops/docker_manager_config.json (the real file is gitignored — it holds a GitHub PAT). Copy this to docker_manager_config.json and fill in github.username/pat. MONOREPO: both containers pull from the single droman42/wb-mqtt-bridge repo — one unified CI run uploads wb-mqtt-bridge-image, wb-mqtt-ui-image, and wb-mqtt-bridge-config. (Until GHCR, action_plan #7, this uses GitHub Actions artifacts via a PAT.)
